title: Thai Prawn Broil
description: A simple and flavorful Thai-inspired dish featuring succulent prawns, a medley of colorful vegetables, and a hint of spice. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: medley
ingredients.notes: mixed bell peppers, carrots, and onions

instructions: Peel and de-vein the prawns, leaving the tails intact.
Season the prawns with salt and pepper.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium-high heat.
Add the medley and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic, ginger, and chili flakes (if using) to the skillet and cook for another minute.
Add the prawns to the skillet and cook until pink and just cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the prawns to a baking sheet and broil for 2-3 minutes, until slightly charred.
Serve the prawns on top of the medley, drizzled with fish sauce and sprinkled with brown sugar.
Garnish with lemongrass and serve immediately.
